title: ailanthus cacodendron var. sutchuenensis
intro: Ailanthus cacodendron var. sutchuenensis, also known as Chinese tree of heaven, is a variety of the Ailanthus tree species native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine, where its bark, leaves, and roots are valued for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Ailanthus cacodendron var. sutchuenensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditional herbal preparations include tea, infusions, and decoctions made from the plant's various parts, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
